programme.title: Olympique Marseille vs Lorient - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 4
programme.desc: Marseille are unbeaten in their last 12 Ligue 1 games against Lorient, since a 5-3 defeat at the Stade Vélodrome under Marcelo Bielsa in April 2015. Marseille have won each of their last five home games against Lorient in L1, as many as in their first 12.

programme.title: Nice vs Nantes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 4
programme.desc: Nice have not won any of their last six Ligue 1 games against Nantes, after winning the previous four. Nice have lost their last two home games against Nantes in Ligue 1, both by a score of 1-2. Both teams have scored in each of their last nine matches at the Allianz Riviera.

programme.title: Auxerre vs Monaco - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 4
programme.desc: Auxerre have lost each of their last six games against Monaco and could lose seven consecutive matches against the same team in all competitions for the first time in 50 years. Auxerre have lost their last two home games against Monaco in Ligue 1 but have never suffered three consecutive losses at home against this opponent in the top flight.

programme.title: Lille vs Toulouse - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 4
programme.desc: Lille have won five of their last seven Ligue 1 matches against Toulouse. Lille have scored in each of their last 17 home games against Toulouse in Ligue 1, their second-best run against any opponent in their history, after their streak against St Etienne between 1994 and 2019.
